scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server,ml -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:ml"
scripts.dev:ml: cd ml-service && source venv/bin/activate && python app.py
scripts.install:all: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
